creator: freebsd@gleffler.us
text:
So removing the 'domains' line from /usr/local/etc/letsencrypt/cli.ini does let 'certbot renew' work correctly.

The cli.ini file is created the first time you use certbot to request a certificate, though, which means the behavior of 'certbot renew' will always be broken. This does appear to be an issue upstream, and I'll dig in further and report upstream as appropriate.

Thanks for taking a look and pointing me on the right path.
